scenarios.name: feature
turns: Add a new `benchmark` subcommand to `crp-setup.py`. It should accept `--skill-a` and `--skill-b` arguments, run the token audit on both, and print a markdown comparison table. Follow the existing command structure.
Use the existing `token-audit.py` logic via import, don't shell out.
The table should show: skill name, naive tokens, CRP tokens, savings %, and estimated cost.
Add a `--output json` option too.
Looks good. Now add a test in `tests/test_integration.py` for this new command.
The test should use a temporary directory with two minimal skill structures.
Run the test to verify it passes.
Good. Summarize what you changed.

scenarios.name: fixbug
scenarios.description: Fix severity case sensitivity in health-check.py
turns: There's a bug in `scripts/health-check.py`. The `emit()` function doesn't normalize the `severity` parameter -- if you pass `"warning"` (lowercase) it fails to match the expected `"WARNING"`. Find and fix it.
Also add a test that covers this case.
The test should verify that `"warning"`, `"Warning"`, and `"WARNING"` all produce the same result.
Run the test to confirm it passes.
Check if there are other places in the file with similar case-sensitivity issues.
Fix any you find.
Run the full test suite to make sure nothing broke.
Good. What was the root cause?

scenarios.name: chat
scenarios.description: Review token audit methodology and propose improvements
turns: Review the token estimation methodology in `scripts/token-audit.py`. What's the biggest weakness and how would you fix it?
Explain why `len(text) // 4` is problematic for mixed Chinese-English content.
Propose a concrete replacement that handles CJK characters better without requiring tiktoken.
Would your approach change the reported 77% savings figure? Estimate by how much.
What other files in this project would benefit from the same fix?
Apply your fix to `scripts/token-audit.py` and `scripts/benchmark.py`.
Run both scripts to verify they still work.
Summarize the changes and the new estimated savings range.
